_comment: Semantic zone name -> list of segment ids. Audited 2026-06-20 against ground truth: number-block placement (numbers only go on hood/doors/rear), baked decals (PORSCHE/GT3R), and the pattern-derived seam graph (zones/seams.json). See _evidence and _needs_insim below.
_groups_comment: Named unions of zones for convenient multi-zone fills (seam-safe along boundaries). Usable anywhere a zone name is.

_evidence.hood=61: confirmed: front number block #5 sits 100% on seg61
_evidence.door_left=14,door_right=15: confirmed as doors: side number blocks #2,#3 sit on them (L/R provisional)
_evidence.rear_bumper=63: was mislabeled rocker_right; seg63 holds the rear 'PORSCHE' lettering and the seam graph links it to rear_wing(43), not the floor
_evidence.rear_quarters=84,47: seam graph: 84<->47 are an adjacent pair (212 inliers, ~1px) at the tail
_evidence.removed: rocker_right=[63] (wrong) and the rockers group (rocker_left's true twin is not yet identified)

_needs_insim._comment: Resolvable only with one in-sim screenshot (or Jay's knowledge). Until then these are provisional.
_needs_insim.left_right_sides: door_left/right, rear_quarter_left/right, mirror_left/right, rocker_left — sides may be swapped
_needs_insim.rocker_right: true right rocker (mirror of seg51) not yet identified among unlabeled segments
_needs_insim.hood_seg62: seg62 grouped into hood from the original pass; not independently confirmed
_needs_insim.roof=8: plausible (GT3R text) but not pinned by a number block

_unverified._comment: Large unnamed segments. Seam graph hints noted.
